parityMeta.describes: SR-2 buildReplacementOptions over hack-squat — the CHAIN-DERIVATION path (the override carries no alternativeIds, so candidates = regressionIds + squat-pattern chain members minus self + progressionIds). Exercises Array.from(new Set(...)) de-dup across the three lists, the default rank-by-index (first two → priority, rest → optional), and the generic reasonForReplacement fallbacks. No equipment context.
